items.briefing:
The Australian Government has launched the Horizon 2 action plan, the next phase of Australia's national cyber security strategy. This signals continued investment in protecting Australian organisations and individuals online. Separately, Scamwatch is warning about two active scam types: fake food delivery messages and harmful online relationships — both designed to trick people into handing over money or personal details.

New AI tools like Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 are raising cybersecurity concerns, as criminals can potentially use advanced AI to craft more convincing scams and phishing messages. Although overall phishing volumes have dropped, the attacks that do occur are increasingly sophisticated and harder to spot.

**Tip:** If you receive an unexpected message about a food delivery or an online relationship, don't click any links — go directly to the official website or app instead.

featured.title: Government launches Horizon 2 action plan for Australia’s cyber security strategy
featured.quote: Australia's government launches Horizon 2 cyber security strategy, directly shaping national digital defense policy.
